🟢 HIGH PRIORITY (Learn + Practice FIRST)

* API Gateway
* Service
* API Communication
* Database per Service
* Message Queue
* Event-Driven Architecture
* Retry Mechanism
* Timeout
* Idempotency
* Logging
* Health Check
* Data Consistency
* Eventual Consistency
* Distributed Locking
* Caching (Redis)
* Rate Limiting
* Pub/Sub


🟡 MEDIUM PRIORITY (After basics feel solid)

* Saga Pattern
* Compensation
* Dead Letter Queue
* Circuit Breaker
* Throttling
* Load Balancing
* Horizontal Scaling

🔵 LOW PRIORITY (Skip for now / learn later)

* Service Discovery
* Containerization (Docker)
* Orchestration (Kubernetes)
* Config Management
* Authentication
* Authorization
* JWT
* Monitoring
* Tracing
* CI/CD
* Versioning
* Backward Compatibility
* Bulkhead Pattern
* Sidecar Pattern
